source: Cross-module data connection audit — prevent FINANCE_BUGS_20260315.md pattern recurring in other modules

features.title: Inventory Module — Hardcoded GL Codes & Data Flow Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in lib/actions/inventory-gl.ts — all replaced with SYS_ACCOUNTS
Zero hardcoded GL codes in app/actions/inventory.ts that reference account codes
Stock adjustments (ADJUSTMENT_IN/OUT) create correct GL journal entries via postJournalEntry
Stock transfers between warehouses create GL entries if they affect asset accounts
PO receive (PRODUCTION_IN) creates GL entry: DR Inventory Asset, CR AP or GRN clearing
SO shipment (SO_SHIPMENT) creates GL entry: DR COGS, CR Inventory Asset
All inventory hooks import from correct action files (not monolithic finance.ts)
Grep verification: zero matches for hardcoded codes in inventory action files

features.title: Procurement Module — Hardcoded GL Codes & PO→GRN→Bill Flow Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in lib/actions/procurement.ts — all replaced with SYS_ACCOUNTS
PO approval creates AP bill via recordPendingBillFromPO (verified working)
GRN creation updates inventory correctly
PO return creates proper GL reversal entry (DR AP, CR Inventory)
All procurement hooks import from correct action files
Grep verification: zero matches for hardcoded codes in procurement action files

features.title: HCM/SDM Module — Payroll→GL & Attendance Data Flow Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in app/actions/hcm.ts — uses dynamic account lookup from config
Payroll posting creates proper journal entries (DR Salary Expense, CR Salary Payable, CR BPJS, CR PPh21)
Payroll disbursement creates GL entry (DR Salary Payable, CR Bank/Cash)
HCM imports postJournalEntry from finance-gl.ts (fixed from finance.ts)
Payroll GL account codes are configurable via getPayrollAccounts(), not hardcoded

features.title: Sales & CRM Module — SO→Invoice→AR & Hardcoded GL Codes Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in lib/actions/sales.ts — all replaced with SYS_ACCOUNTS
SO delivery auto-creates AR invoice (createInvoiceFromSalesOrder now imports from finance-invoices.ts)
Sales return creates correct GL reversal using SYS_ACCOUNTS
All sales hooks import from correct action files
Grep verification: zero matches for hardcoded GL codes in sales action files

features.title: Manufacturing Module — WO→Inventory→GL & BOM Cost Flow Audit
acceptance_criteria: Zero hardcoded GL account codes in manufacturing API routes — all use SYS_ACCOUNTS
Work order completion creates correct GL entries (DR WIP→FG, CR Raw Materials→WIP)
Production return creates proper GL reversal entries
Grep verification: zero matches for hardcoded GL codes in manufacturing files
